pub_footer_tagline: Plataforma de operaciones con IA para equipos de fabricación.
pub_mfg_hero_title: Reduzca paradas no planificadas, retrasos en pedidos y estrés de cumplimiento en una sola plataforma de IA.
pub_mfg_hero_subtitle: FabricOS ayuda a equipos de Operaciones y Supply Chain (10-500 personas) a prevenir averías, monitorizar proveedores e informes ESG en minutos.
pub_mfg_strip_intro: Pensado para fábricas y supply chain en 2026
pub_mfg_pain_title: Problemas reales, impacto directo en el P&L
pub_mfg_pain_subtitle: FabricOS elimina los cuellos de botella típicos de las PYME manufactureras.
pub_mfg_pain1_desc: Line stoppages that hit production and margins.
pub_mfg_pain2_desc: Critical orders slip without early visibility.
pub_mfg_pain3_desc: Excel, email, and disconnected systems—slow decisions.
pub_mfg_pain4_desc: Weeks to produce compliance reports that are hard to repeat.
pub_mfg_sol_title: Un SO operativo para la planta
pub_mfg_sol_subtitle: Five integrated modules on one data model.
pub_mfg_sol1_desc: Live KPIs on orders, assets, delays, and prioritized AI alerts.
pub_mfg_sol2_desc: Telemetry + risk score to act before the stop.
pub_mfg_sol3_desc: ETAs, slippage, and notifications before it turns critical.
pub_mfg_sol4_desc: Performance and risk scores on lead time and quality.
pub_mfg_sol5_desc: Monthly reports with PDF exports ready for audit.
pub_mfg_roi_title: Valor medible en las primeras semanas
pub_mfg_roi_subtitle: Typical metrics for operations teams adopting FabricOS.
pub_mfg_roi_quote:
"We used to chase problems. Now we see them coming and decide with data—not last-minute alarms."

Operations Manager, Mid-size Manufacturing
pub_mfg_final_subtitle: Predictive maintenance, supply chain, and compliance in one decision flow—with governance and audit trail.
pub_feat_subtitle: Una plataforma modular para equipos de fabricación.
pub_feat_pm_desc: Machine registry, maintenance logs, IoT telemetry simulation, and AI-driven risk scoring.
pub_feat_ord_desc: Order lifecycle, workflows, delay detection, and proactive alerts.
pub_feat_sup_desc: Reliability and compliance indicators per supplier with operational dashboards.
pub_feat_esg_desc: Monthly emissions and supplier reports with PDF export for stakeholders and audit.
pub_feat_rt_desc: Live machine status and alerts over realtime channels.
pub_price_title: Planes claros para operaciones de fabricación
pub_price_subtitle: De equipos lean a multi-planta: precio predecible.
pub_price_footnote: IVA y condiciones según presupuesto. Trial sin tarjeta Starter y Growth.
pub_contact_subtitle: Cuéntenos plantas y prioridades: responderemos con un alcance realista.
pub_contact_form_lead: No obligation. Response within 1–2 business days.
pub_contact_snackbar: Thanks—in production we'll wire this to your CRM or email.
pub_faq_subtitle: Technical and operational details on rollout, data, and capabilities.
pub_faq_q1: How does predictive maintenance work in the MVP?
pub_faq_a1: FabricOS combines telemetry snapshots and maintenance history to produce a failure-risk score with placeholder AI logic—extendable with your models.
pub_faq_q2: Can we manage multiple plants or teams?
pub_faq_a2: Yes. Multi-tenant company workspaces and role-based access (Admin, Manager, Operator).
pub_faq_a3: Yes. ESG reports can be generated and exported as PDF from the reports module.
pub_faq_a4: Yes. Alerts and machine status updates are delivered in realtime via Supabase.
pub_legal_subtitle: Documentación legal y transparencia de datos y cookies.
